title: Add canary metadata module
description: Create the deterministic src/canary-metadata.js helper with a named canaryMetadata export, preserve src/index.js and package.json behavior, and verify FR-001, FR-002, NFR-001, NFR-002, and NFR-003 with inspection plus the TechSpec validation commands. This task is scoped to <= 60 minutes and one implementation file.
acceptance_criteria: src/canary-metadata.js exports a named canaryMetadata function with no default export replacing it.
Calling canaryMetadata() returns an object whose project field is exactly "monozukuri-soak-test" and whose purpose field is exactly "v2-live-canary".
src/canary-metadata.js contains only deterministic object construction and performs no I/O, environment, file, network, process, or dependency access.
src/index.js remains unchanged and continues to expose the existing hello export.
package.json remains unchanged with no new runtime dependencies or script changes.
npm test, git diff --check, node --check src/canary-metadata.js, and the direct node --input-type=module import check all exit 0.
